payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Commit the architecture roles as durable memory; preserve the Telegram and model-selection items as open questions, not decisions.

entity_resolution.reason: No disambiguation was needed beyond preserving named systems as distinct entities.

payload.intent: Extract durable architecture preferences and unresolved questions from the chat summary.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is unresolved which model is the cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Preserved 2 unresolved questions without converting them into facts.

repair_options: Mark Telegram as a decision only after explicit confirmation.
Record model-selection results only after a concrete benchmark or cost/performance comparison.
